data.title: Cosan Seeks New Investors for Rafzen Joint Venture
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

Cosan ( (CSAN) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On September 4, 2025, Cosan S.A. announced that it is actively seeking new investors for its joint venture with Shell, Rafzen, as part of its ongoing efforts to enhance its capital structure. The company has been approached by various interested parties, but no binding commitments have been made yet. Cosan assures its stakeholders that it will keep them informed of any significant developments in accordance with legal requirements.

The most recent analyst rating on (CSAN) stock is a Hold with a $5.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cosan stock, see the CSAN Stock Forecast page.

The company’s high leverage and net losses weigh heavily on its financial health, while technical indicators suggest bearish momentum. Valuation concerns, including a negative P/E ratio, further contribute to a cautious outlook.

Cosan S.A. is a publicly held company based in São Paulo, Brazil, primarily involved in the energy and infrastructure sectors. It partners with major companies like Shell and focuses on improving its capital structure and exploring investment opportunities.

data.title: FPX Nickel Advances Awaruite Concentrate Production for EV Battery Supply Chain
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

The latest announcement is out from FPX Nickel ( (TSE:FPX) ).

FPX Nickel Corp. has completed a large-scale mineral processing pilot test for its Baptiste Nickel Project, producing bulk samples of awaruite concentrate. This development enhances FPX Nickel’s strategic positioning by offering flexibility in processing options, allowing the concentrate to be used directly in stainless steel production or as feedstock for battery-grade nickel sulphate. The successful production run supports FPX Nickel’s discussions with potential partners in the EV battery supply chain, positioning awaruite as a new source of nickel alongside established intermediates like MHP and matte.

Spark’s Take on TSE:FPX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:FPX is a Underperform.

FPX Nickel’s overall stock score is low due to critical financial performance challenges, including no revenue and reliance on external funding. Technical indicators are neutral, and while recent corporate developments offer potential future benefits, the current unattractive valuation and financial struggles are significant drawbacks.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:FPX stock, click here.

More about FPX Nickel

FPX Nickel Corp. operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of nickel projects. The company is primarily involved in producing awaruite concentrate, a nickel product used in various applications including electric vehicle battery supply chains. FPX Nickel aims to provide a sustainable and low-carbon source of nickel to meet the growing demand in the EV market.

Average Trading Volume: 63,516

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: C$73.98M

data.title: Wiley Reports Q1 2026 Results with AI Revenue Growth
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

An update from John Wiley Sons Cl A ( (WLY) ) is now available.

On September 4, 2025, Wiley reported its first quarter fiscal year 2026 results, highlighting a revenue of $397 million, a slight decrease from the previous year due to divested businesses. The company saw a 7% increase in operating income and a significant improvement in diluted earnings per share. A key highlight was the growth in research revenue driven by AI licensing projects and open access growth. Wiley executed a landmark AI licensing project with a large tech company and announced a strategic partnership with Anthropic to boost AI integration in scholarly research. The company also increased its dividend for the 32nd consecutive year and expanded its share repurchase authorization. Wiley remains confident in its fiscal 2026 outlook, driven by strong demand trends in research and AI, and anticipates cost savings and growth in recurring revenue models.

The most recent analyst rating on (WLY) stock is a Hold with a $43.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on John Wiley Sons Cl A stock, see the WLY Stock Forecast page.

The company’s strategic initiatives and corporate events provide a positive outlook, but the stock’s valuation remains a concern.

data.title: Petrobras Issues $2 Billion in Global Notes to Strengthen Financial Position
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Petroleo Brasileiro SA- Petrobras ( (PBR) ) has shared an announcement.

On September 3, 2025, Petrobras Global Finance B.V., a subsidiary of Petróleo Brasileiro S.A. – Petrobras, announced the issuance of $2 billion in global notes. The issuance includes $1 billion of 5.125% notes due in 2030 and $1 billion of 6.250% notes due in 2036. This move is part of Petrobras’s strategy to manage its financial obligations and strengthen its market position, with the notes being guaranteed by Petrobras and underwritten by major financial institutions including BBVA Securities Inc., Citigroup Global Markets Inc., and others.

The most recent analyst rating on (PBR) stock is a Buy with a $13.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Petroleo Brasileiro SA- Petrobras stock, see the PBR Stock Forecast page.

To see Spark’s full report on PBR stock, click here.

More about Petroleo Brasileiro SA- Petrobras

Petróleo Brasileiro S.A. – Petrobras is a Brazilian petroleum corporation primarily involved in the oil and gas industry. It is a partially state-owned enterprise focused on the exploration, production, refining, and transportation of oil and gas products, with significant operations in Brazil and abroad.

data.description:

Canadian General Inv ( (TSE:CGI) ) has issued an update.

Canadian General Investments reported an unaudited net asset value per share of $76.67 as of August 31, 2025, with year-to-date and 12-month NAV returns of 11.9% and 22.3%, respectively. These returns are slightly below the S&P/TSX Composite Index benchmarks. The company has reduced its leverage to 12.5% of net assets, and its share price closed at $42.35, reflecting returns of 6.8% and 14.3% for the same periods. The announcement indicates a strategic focus on maintaining a diversified investment portfolio and managing leverage to optimize shareholder returns.

data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

TryHard Holdings Limited ( (THH) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On August 27, 2025, TryHard Holdings Limited entered into an underwriting agreement with US Tiger Securities Inc. for its initial public offering (IPO) of 1,525,000 ordinary shares at a price of $4.00 per share, generating approximately $7 million in gross proceeds. The shares began trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the ticker symbol ‘THH’ on August 28, 2025, and the offering closed on August 29, 2025. The company plans to use the proceeds for business development, strategic acquisitions, and general corporate purposes. This IPO marks a significant step for TryHard Holdings in expanding its market presence and enhancing its operational capabilities.

More about TryHard Holdings Limited

TryHard Holdings Limited is a lifestyle entertainment company based in Japan, focusing on event curation, consultancy and management services, sub-leasing of entertainment venues, and the ownership and operation of restaurants. The company aims to redefine the entertainment landscape by merging creativity, technology, and hospitality expertise to create unique and immersive experiences.

data.title: Puma Exploration Resumes Drilling, Discovers Deepest Gold at Williams Brook
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Puma Exploration ( (TSE:PUMA) ) just unveiled an update.

Puma Exploration Inc. has resumed its 2025 drilling program at the Williams Brook Project, discovering the deepest visible gold occurrence to date at the Lynx Gold Zone. The ongoing $2M exploration program, fully funded and in collaboration with Kinross Gold, aims to extend known mineralization and provide further insights into the geological structure. The company also plans a 1,500-metre drilling program at the Jaguar Gold Zone, where previous trenching returned higher gold grades than historical results.

Spark’s Take on TSE:PUMA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:PUMA is a Neutral.

Puma Exploration’s overall stock score is driven primarily by its concerning financial performance, with a lack of revenue and ongoing losses presenting significant risks. The technical analysis shows a neutral stance with no strong momentum in either direction. Valuation metrics are unattractive due to negative earnings and the absence of dividends. The stability provided by a debt-free balance sheet is a positive aspect, but the lack of operational success remains a critical challenge.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:PUMA stock, click here.

More about Puma Exploration

Puma Exploration Inc. is a mining company focused on the exploration and development of gold resources. The company operates primarily in Northern New Brunswick, Canada, and collaborates with Kinross Gold to advance its projects.
